_note: Fair-play tiebreaker overrides for groups where pts/GD/GF are identical. Only affects teams that are genuinely tied on all three stats — if stats diverge the computed order wins automatically. Update from official FIFA group tables (inside.fifa.com or BBC Sport) when a tiebreaker is confirmed. Format: {group_letter: {team_name: correct_position}}.
_C: Morocco had better fair play vs Brazil in their 1-1 draw (confirmed Wikipedia/CBS Sports)
_F: Japan had better fair play vs Netherlands in their 2-2 draw (confirmed Wikipedia/CBS Sports). No score impact: MIKE owns both.
_G: New Zealand had better fair play vs Iran in their 2-2 draw (confirmed Wikipedia/CBS Sports)
